title: inbox.classify
description: Classify an Inbox folder as single_type, mixed, or unclassified using deterministic IMAGETYP-based evidence. Idempotent unless force_rescan is true. Returns a contentSignature that must be supplied to inbox.confirm to guard against TOCTOU drift.

inbox_item_id.description: Stable identifier of the Inbox folder candidate.

force_rescan.description: If true, invalidate cached metadata for this Inbox item and re-read headers from disk.

content_signature.description: Folder-level signature computed per R-Sig-1 (sha256 of sorted per-file signatures). Must be supplied to inbox.confirm to guard against TOCTOU drift. (Ref: A8, R-Sig-1)

destination_preview.description: Path preview produced by the active Naming & Structure pattern. Preview only; the canonical destination is resolved at plan generation time.

unclassified_files.description: Relative file paths where IMAGETYP was absent, unreadable, or did not match any normalization entry. These files have per-file unclassified markers and are surfaced in the UI as 'Needs review'. (Ref: R-FileMarker)

errors.description: No InboxItem exists for the provided inbox_item_id.
Folder is reachable but no file metadata could be read (permissions, corruption, missing mount).
